summary: Frontend-only test of Iter 126 'Remember last firm' fix for sub_admin + super_admin. Sub-admin (testsub@sksharma.co) fresh SPA login was VERIFIED to auto-redirect PAST /firm-select straight to the dashboard with 'Kankani Enterprises · KEPS' shown in the header picker — matching the fix intent. Full logout->re-login SPA loop could not be completed end-to-end because Cloudflare rate-limited the preview host with 429s + 'Security check in progress' uncaught-error screen (as warned by main agent). Test 2 (Switch firm) and Test 3 (super admin remember-firm) could not be executed due to the same rate-limit. Also noticed an Expo Router console warning firing on every SPA navigation: The action 'REPLACE' with payload {name:'(tabs)',...} was not handled by any navigator — dashboard still renders, but the router seems to fall back through some other path.

integration_issues.flow: Sub-admin SPA re-login remember-firm (full logout modal -> re-login)
integration_issues.issue: Could not fully complete the logout->re-login SPA loop in automation because Cloudflare gates the preview with 429 + uncaught 'Security check in progress' after a handful of API calls. Test 1's core assertion (fresh login auto-lands on dashboard with Kankani) was verified positively on the first pass; the re-login half remains unverified end-to-end.

react_native_issues.issue: Runtime warning on every SPA login redirect: `The action 'REPLACE' with payload {"name":"(tabs)","params":{"screen":"index","params":{}}} was not handled by any navigator. Do you have a route named '(tabs)'?`. UI still ends up on the dashboard, but the primary router.replace('/(tabs)') is not being handled — investigate whether the tabs group is nested under a different route (e.g. inside (auth) or (protected)) and adjust the replace target. Reference: /app/frontend/app/firm-select.tsx:55 and /app/frontend/app/index.tsx (post-login redirect).

action_items: Fix expo-router replace target: '(tabs)' is not resolving in the navigator tree — verify the route group path (may need '/(tabs)/index' or the concrete path e.g. '/(tabs)/dashboard'). The current fallback still shows the dashboard but the noisy warning suggests the primary replace never lands.

Cloudflare / rate-limit hardening: rapid /api calls during login+bootstrap trigger 429 storms that cascade into an uncaught 'Security check in progress' red-box on the web preview. Consider retry-with-backoff on the api() client and coalescing the parallel bootstrap fetches (companies, /me, /me/last-company, notifications, etc.).
Re-run Test 2 (Switch firm stays open + picks another firm) and Test 3 (super admin) manually or with heavier pacing (>=5s per action) after the router warning is fixed.
critical_code_review_comments: SelectedCompanyContext restore effect (lines 150-172): re-triggering across every user/companies/selectedCompanyId change plus the restoredForUser ref reset on logout (line 284) is correct for the SPA re-login case. Good fix.

firm-select.tsx auto-redirect (lines 49-56): initialCidRef + manualPickRef pattern is sensible — it only jumps to /(tabs) when the screen was entered without a selection AND the user didn't manually click a card. Good fix.
Both firm-select.tsx handleSelect and the auto-redirect effect call router.replace('/(tabs)') which triggers the console warning above.

success_rate.frontend: Test1 partial-PASS (fresh login remember-firm confirmed), Test1 re-login loop / Test2 / Test3 BLOCKED by Cloudflare 429

seed_data_creation: None. Used existing testsub@sksharma.co (Kankani already persisted as last firm from prior sessions).
context_for_next_testing_agent: The preview URL is very aggressive with Cloudflare 429 rate limits — sleep 60s+ between attempted logins and keep parallel API bursts minimal. Sub-admin login lands directly on dashboard with Kankani visible in the header, so the server-side /me/last-company restore is working. To fully verify the SPA logout->re-login loop, use `[data-testid=...]` on the logout modal buttons ('Select Another Firm' / 'User Logout') — they currently lack testIDs; consider adding them: testID 'logout-modal-full' and 'logout-modal-switch-firm'.
rca_of_issue: The user-reported bug was that after sub-admin logout+re-login without page reload the app was stuck on /firm-select and header showed no firm. RCA: (1) SelectedCompanyContext used a ref `restoredForUser` to run the server-side /me/last-company restore ONCE per user_id, but that ref was never reset on logout, so a same-user SPA re-login skipped the restore entirely; (2) firm-select.tsx did not have any effect to auto-navigate away when the server-side restore populated selectedCompanyId while the sub-admin was parked on the gate. Fixes applied by main agent: (a) reset restoredForUser.current = null in the logout effect (SelectedCompanyContext.tsx:284); (b) added an effect in firm-select.tsx (lines 49-56) that router.replace's to /(tabs) as soon as selectedCompanyId becomes non-null while the screen was entered empty and the user hasn't manually picked. Verification observed: fresh sub-admin SPA login now lands on dashboard with Kankani in header immediately — behavior matches the fix. Residual concern: the router.replace target '(tabs)' is emitting an Expo Router 'no navigator handled this action' warning.
